title: Buttons
description: Minecraft Dungeons like buttons for Legacy4J Xbox & PlayStation tooltips.
body:
![Buttons under the creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WWF7Y7Wu/images/e418fadd7f8b202b8283fa4aa5a2a84754d4c551.png)

Minecraft Dungeons like buttons for Legacy4J Xbox & PlayStation tooltips.

Changes all button tooltips to give Legacy4J a modern feel.
